name: World Legacy's Nightmare
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>遺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>物</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>へ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>誘</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いざな</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>う<ruby lang="jp"><rb>悪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>夢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Nightmare Beckoning to the Star Relic
desc:
You take no battle damage from attacks involving your co-linked monsters. Once per turn: You can activate 1 of these effects;
● Move 1 "Knightmare" monster you control to another of your Main Monster Zones.
● Switch the locations of 2 "Knightmare" monsters in your Main Monster Zones.
